title: Mixed-style cleanup across 5 functions in PermissionService
prompt: Refactor all of MyApp.PermissionService from test_fixtures/mixed_style_module.ex. Every function must be rewritten: can?/2 is a mix of case, function heads, and body if — unify to heads with guards where applicable. describe/1 mixes a guarded head with a case — unify to heads. Also add a new helper `admin?/1` that's a single pattern-matched head. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.PermissionService do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Requires a coherent philosophy + consistency across 5+ functions.
